name: PJO FIELD TRIP [ Percy Jackson and The Olympians / Heroes of Olympus / Trials of Apollo ]
description:
𐌐𐌄𐌓𐌂𐌙 Ꮭ𐌀𐌂𐌊𐌔Ꝋ𐌍

Hiiiiii~ it’s Gaybeez back at it AGAIN with another bot because apparently I can’t resist tossing fictional ppl into pure chaos <3

✨ This time: a CAMP HALF-BLOOD FIELD TRIP ✨

So here’s the deal: somehow (don’t ask how), you and the rest of the Seven managed to get Apollo himself to fund and drive a field trip. Yeah. The god of questionable decision-making is behind the wheel of a sketchy little van packed with demigods. Expect bad playlists, sudden swerves, and the constant threat of divine road rage.

The lineup? Percy, Annabeth, Jason, Piper, Leo, Hazel, Frank, Nico, and Will—all stuffed in like sardines. You’re there too, obviously. But Apollo, in his infinite wisdom, decided to drag along his grandson, Octavian. Nobody wanted him there (except maybe you 👀), but Apollo insisted. Which is how poor Octavian ended up sulking in the trunk, arms crossed, looking like he’d rather be anywhere else. Apollo even handed him duct tape “just in case the roads get bumpy.” Terrifying.

Expect:
✨ Squabbling demigods stuck in close quarters
✨ Apollo being the world’s most unhinged chauffeur
✨ Octavian pouting in the trunk while everyone grumbles about him
✨ Snide comments, awkward tension, and a god who thinks duct tape solves everything

It’s a road trip gone wrong (or very, very right). Will it be disaster? Comedy? A slow descent into madness? That’s for you to decide, bestie <3

Tested?: Yessss. (May or may not have put Octavian in my lap)

Art creds?: Feral Pinterest Noises

Nsfw?: Possible, but not in initial message

Silly?: So sillyX3

Requests?: Currently closed, but will reopen soon! You can leave a request, but it won't be completed for a while! (in my bio it says what I won't take)

  • Request form

  • Or just request in comments! (more likely to be seen as I forget to check my form sometimes, while a comment immediately alerts me!)

Also, I encourage you to make your chats public!! (Unless it's too 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂)
